howItWorks.intro: This meditation time calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Beginners: start with 5 minutes, build by 1-2 min/week
Most benefits seen at 10-20 minutes daily
Research shows benefits start with as little as 5 min/day
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How long should I meditate?
faq.answer: Start with 5 minutes if you're new. Research shows meaningful benefits begin at 10-15 minutes daily. Advanced practitioners often sit for 20-45 minutes. The key is consistency — 5 minutes daily beats 30 minutes occasionally.

faq.question: What type of meditation should I try?
faq.answer: For stress: body scan or progressive relaxation. For focus: breath counting or concentration meditation. For sleep: yoga nidra or guided relaxation. For anxiety: mindfulness-based stress reduction (MBSR). Try several and see what resonates.

faq.question: How long until I see benefits?
faq.answer: Many people notice reduced stress within 1-2 weeks of daily practice. Sleep improvements often occur within 2-4 weeks. Brain structure changes (gray matter density) are measurable after 8 weeks of regular practice (Harvard/MGH study).
